should_trigger.prompt: The PrismSpec spec is approved. Write an AC-traced implementation plan.
Convert this spec.md into small tasks with verification commands.
Add TDD red-test tasks for AC-1 and AC-2 before implementation.

should_not_trigger.prompt: Clarify the product scope and acceptance criteria.
Implement T1 from the existing plan.
Review the diff and task evidence.

assertions: Every behavior task references at least one AC id.
Tasks include exact files, commands, expected results, and evidence paths.
A zero-context implementer can execute one task from its brief.
